name: Camp Hash
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Shredded Dried Hash Brown Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in the bottom of a large pot with a lid.
2. Break up the meat as it cooks, ensuring all pink (raw) meat is cooked through.
3. Add water and soup mix, stirring to combine.
4. Heat to boiling and simmer for a few minutes.
5. Add the dry potatoes and stir to mix.
6. Cover the pot and move it to the edge of the fire for about 10 minutes to allow the potatoes to swell with the water.
7. Move the pot back on the heat and stir while cooking the potatoes, which should take about 5-10 minutes.
8. Seasonings may be added with the potatoes during cooking to taste. Hot peppers, chili powder, basil, Italian seasonings are good options.
9. The meat can be any type, such as hamburger or sausage (e.g., Italian sausage), and different meats will provide varying flavors.
10. This hash can be served as either an evening or breakfast meal.
Note: A package of Golden Grill Hash Brown dried potatoes provides for three recipes of Camp Hash.
